protein_name: Guanine nucleotide-binding proteins (G proteins) are involved as modulators or transducers in various transmembrane signaling systems. Acts as an activator of phospholipase C. Belongs to the G-alpha family. G(q) subfamily. Expressed in testis. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
